prestazioni: HR15DE (1.5L) or HR16DE (1.6L) engine swap to MR16DDT (1.6L Turbo from Nissan Juke Nismo) with forged internals: Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings, and ARP head studs. Pair with a Garrett GT2860RS turbo (0.63 A/R, 60 trim) on a custom tubular manifold (JUN Auto or Tomei) for 220-240whp on E85 fuel.

Full bolt-on intake and forced induction system: HKS Super Power Flow Reloaded air filter, custom 3" aluminum intake piping with heat shielding (SARD or Cusco), and a Tomei M82 Type-S blow-off valve. Intercooler upgrade to GReddy Type-20 (front-mount, 500x225x76mm core) with custom crash bar relocation (NRG Innovations).

Standalone ECU (Haltech Elite 2500) with custom wiring harness (Painless Performance) and wideband O2 (AEM X-Series 30-0334). Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (Cube-specific valving), Cusco 22mm front / 19mm rear sway bars, and poly bushings (Energy Suspension). Brake upgrade to DBA 5000 Series rotors (280mm front, 260mm rear) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and stainless steel brake lines (Goodridge).
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works 'Cube Widebody' kit (Z12 chassis-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (Seibon), extended rear bumper, and front lip spoiler. Rear diffuser from Rocket Bunny (Z12-specific) with integrated LED reverse lights (Philips X-tremeUltinon).

Custom paint scheme: Nissan 'Sunset Drift' (3-layer pearl) with matte black roof wrap (3M 1080) and gold accents (vinyl, Avery Dennison). OEM+ headlight retrofit with Morimoto XB LED projectors (3000K) and custom sequential turn signals (Diode Dynamics).

Interior: Bride Zeta III seats (Cube-specific mounting brackets) with Takata 4-point harnesses, NRG quick-release steering wheel hub, and custom roll cage (Custom Cages, 6-point bolt-in). Shift knob upgrade to Mugen MF-10 (HR16DE-specific) with weighted base. Full sound deadening (Dynamat Xtreme) and custom audio system (Focal Utopia Be 6.5" components, JL Audio 10TW3 subwoofer).
